mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ess_metrics (ess_id, rack_id, soc, power_kw, temperature, created_at) VALUES (#{essId}, #{rackId}, #{soc}, #{powerKw}, #{temperature}, #{createdAt})
mapper.select: SELECT id, ess_id AS essId, rack_id AS rackId, soc, power_kw AS powerKw, temperature, created_at AS createdAt FROM ess_metrics WHERE ess_id = #{essId} ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT #{limit}
